name: conduct_code_audit
description: Perform a manual and automated code audit combining static analysis and human review.

parameters.name: generate_sca_report
parameters.description: Run Software Composition Analysis and report licensing and CVE exposure.

parameters.name: run_dependency_fuzzing
parameters.description: Execute dependency fuzzing to uncover parsing and serialization bugs.

parameters.name: create_security_training_module
parameters.description: Generate a hands-on security training module for a given team and topic.

parameters.name: provision_k8s_cluster
parameters.description: Provision a Kubernetes cluster with baseline security controls (RBAC, NetworkPolicy).

parameters.name: scan_container_images
parameters.description: Scan container images for vulnerabilities and misconfigurations.

parameters.name: generate_sbom
parameters.description: Generate an SBOM for an artifact using supported package managers.

parameters.name: validate_infrastructure
parameters.description: Validate IaC templates against security policies and best practices.

parameters.name: simulate_insider_threat
parameters.description: Simulate insider threat behaviors in an isolated environment to test detections.

parameters.name: create_honeypot
parameters.description: Design and deploy a low-interaction honeypot for telemetry collection.

parameters.name: collect_forensic_artifacts
parameters.description: Collect forensic artifacts from a live system (read-only unless authorized).

parameters.name: run_config_audit
parameters.description: Audit configuration drift across environments and report inconsistencies.
